prompt:
Create a vertical retro tennis footwear editorial close-up on a warm clay tennis court.

Frame only the lower legs of a tennis player from mid-calf down. The subject wears white ribbed crew socks, slightly scrunched above the ankles, and white retro low-top leather tennis sneakers with deep green side stripes and a green heel tab. The shoes should look realistic and premium, with soft leather creases, visible stitching, off-white rubber soles, subtle wear, and one loose shoelace loop resting naturally on the clay court.

Place several fuzzy yellow tennis balls around the shoes, with two or three balls partly under or beside the rear heel area, creating a playful but believable sportswear campaign composition. Add another tennis ball softly visible in the background. The tennis balls should have realistic fuzzy felt texture, curved seam lines, slight clay dust, and natural contact shadows.

Use a warm terracotta clay tennis court surface with fine dusty texture, small clay grains, and a soft white tennis court line blurred in the background. The setting should feel like a real outdoor tennis court, but the composition should stay minimal and editorial.

Camera angle should be very low at shoe level, close-up and tight, with the main shoe filling the lower-left and center of the frame. Use a slight diagonal perspective so the front shoe points across the frame while the second foot sits slightly behind. Keep the crop intimate and fashion-focused, not full body.

Lighting should be warm natural late-afternoon sunlight with golden highlights on the white leather, crisp but realistic shadows on the clay, and soft warm bounce from the court. The final image should feel like a premium retro sportswear campaign, photorealistic, tactile, sunlit, stylish, minimal, with realistic leather, sock fabric, clay dust, and tennis ball felt texture. No face, no upper body, no racket, no crowd, no stadium, no text, no UI elements.

Negative Prompt:
Avoid full body, face, upper outfit, tennis racket, active tennis swing, running pose, jumping, stadium, crowd, green hard court, grass court, indoor studio, glossy 3D render, plastic shoes, smooth tennis balls, fake-looking felt, oversized tennis balls, deformed shoes, broken soles, warped laces, extra feet, bad anatomy, distorted legs, muddy details, overexposed white shoes, harsh flash, overly saturated colors, messy background, readable brand logos, fake text, watermark, app interface, expand icon, AI modified label, UI buttons.
label: Retro tennis footwear editorial close-up on a warm clay tennis court.

prompt:
Create a vertical 9:16 surreal fashion editorial studio portrait of a stylish male model leaning over a massive oversized tennis ball.

The giant tennis ball should be the main hero object, placed in the center of the frame and filling most of the lower and middle image. It should be extremely large, almost sculpture-like, with bright neon yellow-green fuzzy felt texture, realistic tiny fibers, soft worn fabric detail, and oversized curved off-white tennis seams wrapping around the ball. The ball must feel physical, heavy, round, and real, not like a smooth 3D render.

Place the model behind the giant tennis ball, with his upper body visible above the top curve of the ball. He is leaning forward casually with both forearms resting on the ball, giving a relaxed confident fashion pose. Show a stylish young male model with dark skin tone, short braided hair, dark sunglasses, calm confident expression, and a clean high-fashion presence. He wears an oversized white jacket or loose white shirt, white trousers, and clean white sneakers. One leg and sneaker can be visible on the right side of the ball to show scale, while most of the body remains partially hidden behind the oversized ball.

Use a minimal seamless studio cyclorama background in warm mustard yellow and burnt orange tones, with a smooth gradient and no visible corners. The floor should blend naturally into the background. Keep the set completely clean with no tennis court, no net, no racket, no crowd, and no extra props.

Lighting should be premium studio lighting, soft but directional, coming from the upper front-left. Create realistic highlights on the fuzzy tennis ball, subtle shadows under the ball, gentle contrast on the model’s white clothing, and a polished editorial campaign look. The image should feel playful, surreal, stylish, expensive, and fashion-forward, like a luxury sportswear magazine cover or high-end campaign image.

Composition should be clean and bold: the giant tennis ball dominates the frame, the model appears small but confident above it, with generous warm negative space above the subject. Slight low-angle camera perspective, realistic proportions, sharp details, tactile felt texture, clean color blocking, photorealistic finish, no cartoon look, no illustration style.

Negative Prompt:
Avoid normal tennis court, tennis net, tennis racket, action sports pose, realistic match scene, extra players, crowd, stadium, outdoor location, grass court, clay court, random background objects, cartoon style, toy-like ball, smooth plastic ball, flat 3D render, blurry felt texture, deformed tennis seams, broken circular shape, warped ball, tiny tennis ball, oversized human, bad hands, extra fingers, missing arms, distorted face, creepy expression, floating sunglasses, messy clothing, dirty shoes, low-resolution texture, harsh flash, overexposed white clothes, oversaturated colors, text, logos, watermark, app interface, AI modified label, expand icon, UI buttons.
label: surreal fashion editorial studio portrait of a stylish male model leaning over a massive oversized tennis ball.

prompt: Candid photoreal portrait, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm f/1.8 lens. NOT editorial. CHARACTER: the woman from the first reference image (32 years old, mixed European-Mediterranean, light-olive skin, undone shoulder-length brown wavy hair, casual relaxed expression). Preserve her face EXACTLY — same person, photoreal. She wears a SIMPLE CASUAL outfit — oatmeal linen button-down shirt over a fitted neutral tee, soft and unstyled. SCENE: she stands in a REAL home kitchen or living room — natural everyday space (hint of wood cabinet, a plant, soft window light from camera-left), NOT a styled photoshoot backdrop, NOT a cream-paper studio, NOT an empty wall. PRODUCT: she holds the Eco Protein pouch from the second reference image casually with her right hand at chest level, NOT presenting it dramatically — just holding it loosely like a real customer would when talking about a product she actually uses. Pouch facing forward enough that the label is readable but tilted naturally, NOT a perfect product display angle. Preserve label artwork exactly. She is looking down at the pouch or slightly off-camera into soft light, calm and considering — NO posed-for-camera smile, NO direct camera eye contact, gentle slight smile or neutral expression. Three-quarter framing, head and chest visible. Soft warm window light from her left at 45 degrees, deep soft shadow on right side of face. Color grade: natural, real-photo color. Photoreal, NOT instagram-filter, NOT editorial-magazine. NO branded clothing logos, NO empty backdrop, NO dramatic presentation. Aspect ratio 1:1.
label: Candid photoreal portrait, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm f/1.8 lens

prompt:
A premium 1:1 square CGI overhead product photography frame for a Canadian healthy-snack brand. Subject: three small red Three Farmers ceramic bowls arranged in a balanced triangular layout on a deep Barbecue Red background, each bowl filled with one of the three Protein Snack Mix flavours.

Composition: shot from directly overhead (top-down) - three glossy red ceramic bowls equally spaced. Top center bowl = Cheezy Cheddar mix. Lower-left bowl = Dill Pickle mix. Lower-right bowl = Ranch mix. Each bowl about 25% of frame width.

STRICT MIX COMPOSITION inside each bowl:
ROASTED FAVA BEANS (must be at least 65% of pieces in each bowl): small oval bean shape, brown roasted exterior fully coated with flavour seasoning, natural seam subtly visible. Dominant element.
FLAT SQUARE-ISH CRISPS (about 18%): thin flat fava-bean crisps in flavour colour, small square-ish irregular shapes.
ROUND BUMPY PUFFS (about 12%): small round bumpy spherical baked puffs with flavour seasoning.
CLASSIC PLAIN SALTED PRETZELS (MAXIMUM 2 visible per bowl, ideally 1 per bowl): plain salted twist-knot.

Per-flavour seasoning in each bowl:
Top bowl (Cheddar): warm cheddar-orange seasoning across the beans, crisps, puffs
Lower-left bowl (Dill): pale dill-yellow seasoning with visible green dill flecks
Lower-right bowl (Ranch): cream ranch seasoning with visible green herb specks

Background: full-bleed solid deep Barbecue Red (hex AA1D38), edge to edge. A subtle cream-white striped-field motif with small uphill tractor silhouette etched faintly in one corner as a brand-equity signature.

Around the bowls, a few scattered pieces tumbled onto the red surface as if naturally placed - matching the bowl content for each flavour. Maybe 4-6 pieces visible outside the bowls.

Lighting: bright soft daylight from upper-left, soft drop shadow under each bowl. Crisp specular highlights on salt crystals only. NO drifting dust particles, NO sparkles.

Style: hyperreal overhead product photography, premium Canadian snack brand. Clean professional product showcase from above.

PRESERVE the red ceramic bowls as the actual Three Farmers brand bowls - matte-finished red glossy ceramic with subtle bowl rim.

DO NOT add: any product pouch, packaging, text overlay, watermark, captions, logo, hand, human, kitchen counter, marble texture, water splash. NO chex-style cubic pieces. NO peanuts, hazelnuts, almonds, bread rolls. ABSOLUTELY NO MORE THAN 2 PRETZELS PER BOWL. NO imagined extras.
label: CGI overhead product photography frame for a Canadian healthy-snack brand.

prompt:
A premium 1:1 square CGI brand-anthem product frame for a Canadian snack ad. Subject: the iconic Three Farmers brand heritage motif - a sweeping cream-white wavy striped field that rolls from lower-left up toward upper-right of the frame, occupying the lower 60% of the composition. A stylized small RED graphic tractor silhouette (matching the simple bold flat-vector style on Three Farmers packaging) climbs the cream stripes of the field in the lower-left third, oversized prominent foreground scale.

Above the striped field, all three Three Farmers Protein Snack Mix 150g pouches stand lined up across the horizon line in the upper portion of the frame, slight three-quarter turn, scaled equally - Dill Pickle on the left, Cheezy Cheddar in the middle (slightly elevated as centerpiece), Ranch on the right. Their bottoms rest on the implied horizon of the striped field.

CRITICAL BRAND INTEGRATION - MADE IN CANADA SEAL: prominently placed in the upper-left of the frame, large and clearly visible as a stylized brand stamp - the official "Made in Canada" seal: a half-circle dome shape with a large bold red maple leaf in the center, bilingual arc text reading "GROWN & MADE IN · CULTIVÉ ET FABRIQUÉ AU" in red around the top arc, and "CANADA" in clean cream-white sans-serif type on a red ribbon at the base. The seal sits like a heritage stamp at hero scale (~22% of frame width), white/cream background, integrated as a brand mark over the Barbecue Red background area.

Background: full-bleed deep Barbecue Red (hex AA1D38) above the striped field, edge to edge, flat and graphic. The cream-white striped field with rolling wave bands occupies the lower 60%.

Around the Dill pouch and tumbling down the field: photoreal flavour mix pieces with CRITICAL composition:
ROASTED FAVA BEANS (dominant ~60%): oval with VISIBLE SPLIT SEAM down the middle, brown roasted exterior, cream-yellow interior showing on the split face with flavour seasoning (dill flecks for left, cheddar orange for middle, ranch herb specks for right).
FLAT IRREGULAR CHIPS (~15%): flavour-coloured thin crisps.
ROUND BUMPY PUFFS (~15%): small round bumpy puffs in flavour seasoning.
CLASSIC PLAIN SALTED PRETZELS (~10%, accent only): plain salted twist, accent presence.

Pieces tumble naturally down the striped field as if rolling from the harvest, some frozen mid-air mid-bounce, some resting on the cream stripes. Each piece in macro photographic detail. Drifting flavour-coloured seasoning dust in the air around the slope.

Lighting: dramatic warm cinematic key light from upper-right (matching the field's direction of climb), strong sculpt on the tractor's silhouette, the pouches, and each floating piece. Long soft shadows down the field slope to lower-left.

PRESERVE ALL THREE PRODUCT POUCHES EXACTLY AS SHOWN IN THE REFERENCE IMAGES - pixel-accurate on each. Three Farmers logo bubble, bilingual top banner, maple-leaf Canada badge on pack, three claim bubbles, flavour name, striped field with small tractor at bottom of each pouch. Do not redraw or restyle.

Style: high-end CGI brand-anthem advertising frame, hyperreal product ad meets stylized brand graphic, premium Canadian snack brand heritage frame. The tractor and field motif are the brand's flat-vector iconic silhouette enlarged - NOT photographic real tractor with mechanical detail. The Made-in-Canada seal is a stylized brand stamp graphic, NOT a photograph.

DO NOT add: photographic tractor with mechanical detail, real wheat field, real soil, real sky, real farm landscape, hand, human, kitchen, marble, text overlay other than the Made-in-Canada seal text, watermark, captions, logo or graphic not on the original pouches or the Made-in-Canada seal. NO chex-style cubic pieces. NO peanuts, hazelnuts, bread rolls - brown oval pieces must be ROASTED FAVA BEANS with visible split seams. NO pretzels dominant - they are accent.
label: A premium 1:1 square CGI brand-anthem product frame for a Canadian snack ad
